---
title: "Site Status"
search: false
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    toc: false
---

<div id="status-loading" style="color: #6c757d;">Loading status&hellip;</div>
<div id="status-content" style="display: none;">

<p id="status-timestamp" style="color: #6c757d; font-size: 0.9em;"></p>

<div class="grid" style="margin-top: 1rem;">
  <div class="g-col-4">
    <div class="card h-100">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Bills</h5>
        <p class="card-text">
          <span id="bills-rendered" class="fs-4 fw-bold"></span> updated<br>
          <span id="bills-failed"></span>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-4">
    <div class="card h-100">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Legislators</h5>
        <p class="card-text">
          <span id="legislators-rendered" class="fs-4 fw-bold"></span> updated<br>
          <span id="legislators-failed"></span>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-4">
    <div class="card h-100">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h5 class="card-title">Committees</h5>
        <p class="card-text">
          <span id="committees-rendered" class="fs-4 fw-bold"></span> updated<br>
          <span id="committees-failed"></span>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="errors-section" style="display: none; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <h3>Failed Pages</h3>
  <ul id="errors-list"></ul>
</div>

</div>

<div id="status-error" style="display: none; color: #dc3545;">
  Could not load status data. Run <code>render_site()</code> to generate it.
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  function fmt(dateStr) {
    const d = new Date(dateStr);
    return d.toLocaleString('en-US', {
      weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric',
      hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit', timeZoneName: 'short'
    });
  }

  function failedHtml(n, items) {
    if (n === 0) return '<span style="color:#198754;">No failures</span>';
    return '<span style="color:#dc3545;">' + n + ' failed</span>';
  }

  fetch('./status.json')
    .then(function (r) {
      if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status);
      return r.json();
    })
    .then(function (data) {
      document.getElementById('status-loading').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('status-content').style.display = 'block';

      document.getElementById('status-timestamp').textContent =
        'Last rendered: ' + fmt(data.last_render);

      document.getElementById('bills-rendered').textContent = data.bills.rendered;
      document.getElementById('bills-failed').innerHTML =
        failedHtml(data.bills.failed, data.bills.failed_items);

      document.getElementById('legislators-rendered').textContent = data.legislators.rendered;
      document.getElementById('legislators-failed').innerHTML =
        failedHtml(data.legislators.failed, data.legislators.failed_items);

      document.getElementById('committees-rendered').textContent = data.committees.rendered;
      document.getElementById('committees-failed').innerHTML =
        failedHtml(data.committees.failed, data.committees.failed_items);

      // Collect all failed items
      var allFailed = [];
      (data.bills.failed_items || []).forEach(function (id) {
        allFailed.push({ type: 'Bill', id: id, href: 'legislation/' + id + '.html' });
      });
      (data.legislators.failed_items || []).forEach(function (id) {
        allFailed.push({ type: 'Legislator', id: id, href: null });
      });
      (data.committees.failed_items || []).forEach(function (id) {
        allFailed.push({ type: 'Committee', id: id, href: null });
      });

      if (allFailed.length > 0) {
        var list = document.getElementById('errors-list');
        allFailed.forEach(function (item) {
          var li = document.createElement('li');
          li.textContent = item.type + ': ' + item.id;
          list.appendChild(li);
        });
        document.getElementById('errors-section').style.display = 'block';
      }
    })
    .catch(function () {
      document.getElementById('status-loading').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('status-error').style.display = 'block';
    });
})();
</script>
